Document:
# Воры
[color=#999999][italic]"Йоинк! Я возьму это! И это! О, не возражаешь, если я прихвачу?"[/italic][/color]
Воры — это мелкие, но хитрые [color=green]преступники[/color], которые не могут удержать свои руки при себе. После вашего последнего ареста вам вживили [bold]имплант пацифизма[/bold], но это не остановит вас от попыток пополнить свою коллекцию.
## Art of the Steal Unlike other antagonists, it's important to [bold]stay out of trouble[/bold] because of your pacifism implant. While you can still use [color=yellow]stun weapons[/color] in a pinch, you should run if [color=#cb0000]Security[/color] picks a fight with you. You work alone, and you don't have any friends to pull you out of danger.
But against all odds, you'll successfully swipe what you want using determination, sleight of hand, a few tools, and your [color=cyan]pickpocketing skills[/color].
The pickpocketing skills you have give you a major advantage: [bold]the ability to take things from people without them even noticing[/bold]. With a little practice, you can steal their wallet and keep up a conversation at the same time.
It is advised to get a pair of gloves, as your fingerprints could still be traced back to the stolen goods if they're found.
## Tools of the Trade You've got two more aces up your stolen sleeves: your [color=cyan]thieving beacon[/color] and your [color=cyan]thieving satchel[/color].
Your [color=cyan]thieving beacon[/color] provides safe passage home for trinkets that may not be easy to carry with you on the evac shuttle. Simply find a secluded part of the station to unfold the thieving beacon, then set its coordinates to your hideout. Any shinies near it will be [bold]teleported to your vault when the shift ends[/bold], fulfilling your objectives.
Your [color=cyan]thieving satchel[/color] contains... well, whatever you remembered to pack. [bold]You can select two pre-made kits[/bold] to help you complete grander heists.
After approving your selection, the kits will fold out into a [color=cyan]smuggler's satchel[/color]. Larger kits will fall onto the floor around you. [bold]Don't let anyone see your kits or smuggler's satchel[/bold], as they will recognize it as contraband! The smuggler's satchel can be wrenched to the hull plating underneath floor tiles if you need to hide items from prying eyes.
## Центральный элемент коллекции Ваша клептомания приведёт вас в разные места. В один день вам захочется украсть несколько фигурок. В другой день — промышленный аппарат.
You can steal items by [bold]having them on your person[/bold] when you get to CentComm. Failing this, you can steal larger items by [bold]leaving them by your thieving beacon.[/bold]
Some of the more [italic]animate[/italic] objectives may not cooperate with you. Make sure they're alive and with you or your thieving beacon when the shift ends. A [color=cyan]pet carrier[/color] is optional, but might make the critters easier to handle.
Некоторые из более [italic]одушевлённых[/italic] целей могут не сотрудничать с вами. Убедитесь, что они живы и находятся с вами или вашим маяком по окончании смены.
Вещи, которые вы можете пожелать, включают, но не ограничиваются:
